title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Aptech - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Aptech - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Aptech, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Curriculum Developer for our Ludhiana operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
